title: Silent's random point blank guns
description: A content pack for Vic's Point Blank that includes random guns that i felt like making
body:
sorry the description kinda sucks as this is my first time uploading something to modrinth. Install this content pack like any other point blank content pack. This content pack includes:
a gauss gun type revolver,
![Gauss gun revolver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/456f03447f9321e460950c6f48e99b5a3a543f25.png)
an electrified version of a winchester rifle,
![an electrified winchester rifle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/271c2933488d9a74862b342663ab3697d6cd959c.png)
a scope for the winchester
![a scope for the winchester](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1adb13e4da5b3069fcca537853537de8b2156671.png)
a futuristic type rifle![nova scorch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b39cbc3e7956b56e70d2de11115839699fac36a.png)
ammo for 2 of the current guns.
